Matrix Spins is an online casino. All games use a server-side cryptographic RNG. Players must be 18+ and legally permitted to gamble in their jurisdiction. Please gamble responsibly. Need help? Australia: Gambling Help Online 1800 858 858 · UK: BeGambleAware 0808 8020 133 · US: NCPG 1-800-522-4700.

Terms & Conditions

By using Matrix Spins, you agree to the following:

1. You are at least 18 years of age.

2. Gambling involves risk. Only wager what you can afford to lose.

3. The house maintains a mathematical edge on all games.

4. Results are determined by a cryptographically secure random number generator.

5. Self-exclusion and responsible gambling tools are available — see Responsible Gambling.

6. Full terms at /terms.html. See Provably Fair for RNG details.
